message:
refactor(abi): migrate 5 libc::syscall calls in unistd_abi.rs

Part of bd-h5x EPIC: remove glibc callthrough.

Migrated syscalls:
- chdir -> syscall::sys_chdir
- fchdir -> syscall::sys_fchdir
- fstat -> syscall::sys_fstat
- sleep/usleep -> syscall::sys_nanosleep

Progress: 356 → 351 libc::syscall calls in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
